raw_response_text:
<features>
- Large, flat, spreading petals (tepals)
- Petals are light purple/lavender in color
- Prominent central cluster of stamens/pistils
- Green leaves in the background
</features>
<kb>
- IF [flower has large spreading petals and a prominent central stamen cluster and is purple/lavender] THEN [81]
- IF [flower has large yellow/orange petals with distinct vertical structure and is yellow] THEN [14]
</kb>
<rule_check>
- The Target Image features large, spreading, light purple petals and a prominent central cluster of stamens, which matches the visual pattern of class 81.
</rule_check>

<response>81</response>

- yellow flower petals
- distinct petal shape with some petals drooping downwards
- long, green, blade-like leaves
</features>
